transcript: --why fight me, that's a hundred percent.

You slipped whiskey. I just want you kids to get off my damn shit. Hell, you got a job. [unintelligible] Who are you, yellin' at me? And it doesn't mean drivin' boy, it means this little you-know-what, right here. And you. [laughs]
How nicer can I get you this? How nicer can I get you this? Never - my asshole is a virgin. My asshole is a virgin, I can... God, how many deaths?
How many deaths had to die? You wanna get [unintelligible] honey? [unintelligible] I got, when I got out fifteen thousand dollars cash, [unintelligible] five thousand cash.
They take care of me. Don't be [unintelligible] land back here. [laughs]

Five years! I had kids, I still, I still got my wife and kids because of the money I made off of it. I used to sell heroin and cocaine, and I could care less what the hell happened to the person I sold it to you. You know?

No, no, no, no, no, no no. No, no, no, no, don't get that wrong, that's the money on the streets, that's the money on the streets. [unintelligible] Let me be a pusher once again. Let me be a pusher once again. Because I know of three deaths. I know of three deaths. Yeah, with a razor blade, right? That's what I use on my kids, my own kids. Is it not against the law? And I did it, man, so I could make money. Got my hand up. I wish [unintelligible]. I wish God [unintelligible].
